description_long: This is a pair of standard scissors featuring two sharp, metallic blades joined at a central pivot point. The handles are made of black plastic, each forming an oval loop for finger placement, with one loop slightly larger than the other for ergonomic comfort. The blades are straight and taper to a pointed tip, suitable for precise cutting tasks. The central joint is a visible metal rivet, providing a smooth pivot action for opening and closing the blades. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible brand markings or decorative elements. The scissors are compact and lightweight, making them suitable for everyday use in urban environments such as offices, schools, or homes.
description: A pair of black-handled scissors with pointed metal blades and a central rivet joint. The handles are oval-shaped and ergonomic, with a simple, functional design.
description_view_0: The scissors are shown open, displaying both black handles and the full length of the metallic blades.
description_view_1: A side profile view reveals the thinness of the blades and handles, with the central rivet visible.
description_view_2: The scissors are open from the opposite side, again showing both handles and the sharp, pointed blades.
description_view_3: A narrow edge-on view highlights the slim profile of the scissors and the alignment of the blades.
attribute_handle_type: Symmetrical oval plastic handles, ambidextrous, not padded or coated, standard smooth grip.
attribute_blade_joint_type: Visible metal rivet joint, non-adjustable, standard fixed pivot.
attribute_finger_loop_design: Two oval loops, one slightly larger for ergonomic comfort, smooth surface, no inserts or texturing.
attribute_blade_tip_style: Pointed blade tips, designed for precision cutting.
